scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build --workspace @fit-track/backend && npm run build --workspace @fit-track/frontend
scripts.build:backend: npm run build:shared && npm run build --workspace @fit-track/backend
scripts.build:frontend: npm run build:shared && npm run build --workspace @fit-track/frontend
scripts.dev:backend: npm run build:shared && npm run dev --workspace @fit-track/backend
scripts.dev:frontend: npm run build:shared && npm run dev --workspace @fit-track/frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @fit-track/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @fit-track/backend && npm run typecheck --workspace @fit-track/frontend
